title: The Lofi Starter Pack
description: Welcome to lofi! If you've never cared about lofi music at all, this music pack is just for you!

title: The Lofi Intermediate Pack
description: More lofi songs, for those who want a little more.

title: The Lofi Advanced Pack
description: Unique lofi songs that may be hard to enjoy, but that I still keep coming back to. Contains: jazz, mouth harps, and actual singing...
